name: qualipilot
description: QualiPilot — Outil de pilotage qualité interne (Azure DevOps)

scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules backend/node_modules backend/dist frontend/node_modules frontend/dist
